section_name: Transfer of Title of Impounded Motor Vehicle
text:
(a) To transfer title to a motor vehicle impounded under Section 601.261 (Impoundment of Motor Vehicle) , the owner must apply to the court for permission.

(b) If the court finds that the transfer is being made in good faith and is not being made to circumvent this chapter, the court shall approve the transfer.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.265 — Transfer of Title of Impounded Motor Vehicle

(a) To transfer title to a motor vehicle impounded under Section 601.261 (Impoundment of Motor Vehicle) , the owner must apply to the court for permission.

(b) If the court finds that the transfer is being made in good faith and is not being made to circumvent this chapter, the court shall approve the transfer.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: To transfer title to a motor vehicle impounded under Section 601.261 (Impoundment of Motor Vehicle) , the owner must apply to the court for permission.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the court finds that the transfer is being made in good faith and is not being made to circumvent this chapter, the court shall approve the transfer.
